prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4JX1-TC** (3.0L turbo-diesel) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, custom 1.0mm oversized injectors from **Denso**, and a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU mapped for 350hp at 3,800rpm and 550lb-ft of torque at 2,200rpm on E85 blend fuel

Full **ISUZU 4JX1-TC** forged internals including **Manley I-beam connecting rods**, **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression), and a **Tomei Type-M** billet crankshaft with ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a **PPG 5-speed manual transmission** from the **Isuzu VehiCROSS** with a **OS Giken 2.2L twin-plate clutch**

Custom **3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **HKS Hi-Power** with a **MagnaFlow 10416** catalytic converter and **Borla Pro XS** mufflers, paired with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller and **AEM 30-0300** wideband O2 sensor for precise AFR tuning
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3** widebody kit (modified for Wizard LS chassis) with **custom carbon fiber fenders**, **overfenders**, and **front/rear bumpers** featuring integrated **Seibon carbon fiber hood** and **rear diffuser**

**Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +25** wheels with **Yokohama Advan A052** 245/40R17 tires, paired with **BC Racing BR Type-Coilovers** (custom valved for the Wizard LS chassis) and **Cusco 2-point strut bar** for front-end rigidity

**Full custom interior** with **Recaro SRD-E** seats (retrimmed in **Nappa leather and Alcantara**), **Momo Prototipo** steering wheel, **Defi BF Advance** gauges (boost, EGT, oil pressure), and **custom roll cage** by **Sparco** (bolt-in, 6-point, TIG-welded)
